extraction.one_line_summary: CAVENDISH Mark won a crosswind-threatened stage via textbook Deceuninck-QuickStep leadout after POGACAR personally chased down late splits with 10km remaining.
tactical_patterns: BikeExchange attempted sprint decimation tactics via accelerations before peloton crosswind splits, targeting Matthews positioning over pure leadout.
Yellow jersey POGACAR closed GC-threatening splits himself under 10km, revealing UAE lacks chase depth when crosswinds fragment peloton.
Deceuninck-QuickStep held position without pulling until 400m despite world champion ALAPHILIPPE available, extreme late commitment minimized energy expenditure.

rider_signals.CAVENDISH Mark: positive: 33rd career stage win shows form still ascending mid-tour, not fatiguing
rider_signals.ALBRELLI Sonny: negative: mechanical at critical crosswind moment exposes poor equipment luck and positioning when gruppetto protection unavailable
rider_signals.POGACAR Tadej: neutral: personally closing splits 10km out indicates team weakness but individual strength reserves on flat stages
rider_signals.MORKOV Michael: positive: leadout described as sublime textbook execution confirms elite positioning survives crosswind chaos
